learning_outcomes:
1 1.  |  Major Programme:
Upon completion of the Programme, students
will have acquired the following:
Knowledge:
(1)  |  appreciation and
interpretation of various arts forms
(2)  |  understanding of
cultural history and heritages of HK, China and beyond
(3)  |  understanding of
local and international issues in cultural management
(4)  |  understanding of the
strengths and potentials of arts in a particular context
Skills-based:
(1)  |  organization and
management skills
(2)  |  critical analytical
skills and appreciation/ interpretation of various arts forms
(3)  |  creative skills to
develop innovative approaches and shaping of cultural policy
(4)  |  multi-disciplinary
study
Attitudes:
(1)  |  appreciation and
respect for different cultures
(2)  |  commitment in
developing local culture with a global vision
study_scheme:
Cultural Management Cultural Management Applicable to students admitted in 2023-24
Major Programme Requirement
Students are required to complete a
minimum of 72 units of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Faculty Package:  |  9
CURE1400 [#CUMT1000] and any two courses
from:
ANTH1020, ARTS1004, 1005, 1010, BMBL1001, CHES1100, CHLL1900 or
1902 or 1903, CURE1000, 1110, ENGE1000, FAAS1900, HIST1000, 1700 or 1701,
JASP1090, LING1000, MUSC1000, PHIL1110, THEO1000, TRAN1000
2.  |  Required Courses:  |  18
CUMT1002, CURE1401 [#CUMT1001], CURE1403 [#CUMT1003], CURE4401 [#CUMT4001], MGNT1020, MKTG2010
3.  |  Elective Courses[a]:  |  45
(a)  |  Any 9 units from Area 1
(b)  |  Any 9 units from Area 3
(c)  |  Any 12 units from Area 4[b]
(d)  |  Any 12 units of CUMT courses, with
at least 9 units at 2000 or above level[c]
(e)  |  Capstone Courses: CUMT4102 or 4103
Total:  |  72
Explanatory Notes:
1.  |  ANTH, CUMT, CURE, ENGE, FAAS, JASP,
MGNT, MKTG courses at 2000 and above level will be included in the
calculation of Major GPA for honours classification.
[a]  |  Courses which count towards the
fulfillment of the requirements specified in 1. Faculty Package and 2.
Required Courses above cannot be counted towards the fulfillment of the
requirements specified in 3. Elective Courses.
[b]  |  Students can declare a concentration
in one of the following concentrations/special studies if they
successfully complete 12 units from the same concentration: i. Antiquities and Heritage Management; ii. Cultural Institutions and Curation; and iii. Cultural and Creative Industries
[c]  |  Courses which count towards the
fulfillment of the elective course requirements specified in 3(a), 3(b), 3(c)
and 3(e) cannot be counted towards the fulfillment of the elective course
requirements specified in 3(d).
[#]  |  Old course code
used in 2024-25 and before.

Minor Programme Title Cultural Management
Minor Programme Requirement
Students are required to complete a
minimum of 21 units of courses as follows:
Units
1.  |  Required Courses:  |  9
CURE1401 [#CUMT1001], CURE1403 [#CUMT1003], CURE4401 [#CUMT4001]
2.  |  Elective Courses:  |  12
(a)  |  Any 3 units from CURE2405 [#CUMT2005], CURE2411 [#CUMT3001], CURE2412 [#CUMT3002], CURE3403 [#CUMT3003], CURE3404 [#CUMT3004]
(b)  |  Any 9 units from one of the
concentrations of Area 4, with at least 3 units at 3000 or above level
Total:  |  21
Explanatory
Notes:
[#]  |  Old course
code used in 2024-25 and before.
Minor Programme Title Curating and Artistic
Strategies
Minor Programme Requirement
Students
are required to complete a minimum of 18 units of courses as follows with
at least 2 courses at 3000 or above level:
Units
1.  |  Required Courses:  |  6
CURE2407 [#CUMT2007], FAAS2117
2.  |  Elective Courses:  |  12
(a)  |  Any 2 courses from the following: CURE2411
[#CUMT3001], CURE3404 [#CUMT3004], CURE3405 [#CUMT3005], CURE3408 [#CUMT3008]
(b)  |  Any 2 courses from the following[a]:
FAAS2208, 3108, 3229, 4201
Total:  |  18
Explanatory Note:
[a]  |  CUMT major students cannot take
FAAS3108 and FAAS4201 to fulfill the elective course requirements
specified in 2(b).
[#]  |  Old course code used in 2024-25 and
before.
